Notice Of Motion And Renewed Motion To Compel Defendants Further Responses And Production Of Documents
Off Calendar Jan-16-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances made. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Re: PLAINTIFFS' Renewed Motion To Compel Defendants Further Responses And Production Of Documents;

Plaintiffs' motion to compel further responses is granted. Defendants must serve verified further responses without objections to all the document requests and produce all responsive documents no later February 3, 2025. Defendantsand their counsel must pay reasonable monetary sanctions of $7,700 to plaintiffs no later than February 3, 2025.

Defendants are misusing the discovery process by engaging in a pattern to force Plaintiffs to file motions to compel and then producing documents shortly before the hearing. Plaintiffs' document requests seek discovery relevant, nonprivileged information. Defendants have not argued otherwise. Instead, they claim they have produced everything they can. However, Defendants have not served verified responses to every document request claiming that they have produced all responsive documents in their possession, custody and control.

Judge: Harold E.Kahn; Clerk: K.Valdes; Not Reported.(302/HEK)

Proposed order signed and filed.
